title: Partner Administration Service Report
description: A Partner Administration Service Report is a formal or system-generated report that summarizes the performance, operational activities, financial transactions, compliance status, and issues related to a partner relationship.

PartnerAdministraionServiceReportType.description: Partner Administration Service Report Types refer to the specific categories of reports used to monitor, manage, and evaluate the activities, performance, and compliance of the banks business partners. These partners could include payment processors, fintech companies, correspondent banks, agents, or third-party service providers.
